dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6209 IH: American Hemp Protection Act of 2025
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. Mace (for herself, Mr. Massie, Ms. Lofgren, and Mr. Baird) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Agriculture

form.official-title: To repeal section 781 of the Continuing Appropriations, Agriculture, Legislative Branch, Military Construction and Veterans Affairs, and Extensions Act, 2026, relating to amendments to the Agricultural Marketing Act of 1946, with respect to hemp.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the American Hemp Protection Act of 2025.

section.header: Repeal of amendments to Agricultural Marketing Act of 1946, with respect to hemp
section.text: Effective November 12, 2025, section 781 of the Continuing Appropriations, Agriculture, Legislative Branch, Military Construction and Veterans Affairs, and Extensions Act, 2026 (Public Law 119–37) is repealed.
